zh.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer於大約1184年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德。她於1197年與Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer于大约1184年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德。她于1197年与Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer was born about 1184, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. She married Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon in 1197, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1252, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer est née environ 1184, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon en 1197, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1252, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer wurde um 1184 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1197 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1252 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer è nata il circa 1184 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England. Lei sposato Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon nel 1197, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1252, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimerは約1184年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた。1197年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでCynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer(은)는 대략 1184년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1197년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer nasceu aproximadamente 1184, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon em 1197, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1252, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer родилась около 1184 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon в 1197 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1252 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Juliana de Mortimer nació aproximadamente 1184, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Cynfelyn Manofon Ap Dolphin Lord of Manofon en 1197, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1252, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
